title: SOULS PLUGIN (Discountinued)
description: Plugin that adds to your smp new mechanic of souls souls to server !
body:
Plugin that change your smp!

### WHAT PLUGIN DO?
Add souls to your server ...

if you kill player you get one **soul**

### HOW MANY OPTIONS PLUGIN HAVE?

Just one

/gsmp give <soul> <player>
                        
                        ↖️Soul list will be visible 
### SOULS LIST

- STRENGH SOUL - common - give Effect Strengh 1 
- SEA SOUL -common - give Effect Dolphin Grace 2
- ARMORED / RESISTANCE SOUL - common - give Effect Resistance 2
- REGENERATION SOUL - common - give Effect Regeneration 2
- ABSPORTION SOUL - rare - give absportion 2
-HASTE SOUL - common- Give haste 2 
### One Time use Soul LIST
- CURSED/POSSESION SOUL - MYTHIC - all players within 5 Blocks are pushed 5 Blocks away and get effect Wither 2
- Dash SOUL - RARE - Dash 2 Blocks
- Wind Soul - Myhic - Teleport player within 5 blocks and add players within 10 blocks effect slowness and windcharged (this is shortened description of soul)
  # Permissions
- gsmp.admin - admin commands
